case_title: OLYMPIC VIEW REALTY, LLC. VS. MYOUNG MCCLURE et al

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT TO COMPLAINT WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT MCCLURE, CHRISTIAN
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT UPON BREACH FILED BY DEFENDANT MCCLURE, MYOUNG MCCLURE, DOUGLAS
DECLARATION OF JEFFREY MARGULIES UPON A BREACH FILED BY PLAINTIFF OLYMPIC VIEW REALTY, LLC.
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER IN SUPPORT OF REQUEST TO VACATE AND SET ASIDE JUDGMENT AGAINST DEFTS, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF OLYMPIC VIEW REALTY, LLC.
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF OLYMPIC VIEW REALTY, LLC. AS TO DEFENDANT MCCLURE, MYOUNG SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

STIPULATION FOR JUDGMENT FILED; THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MCCLURE, MYOUNG MCCLURE, DOUGLAS THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 350 ARBALLO DRIVE, 5-K $3,199.98 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,199.98, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
